name: Vijaynagar Beach
description: Also known as Beach No. 5, this incredibly tranquil stretch of white sand is lined with dense Mahua trees offering massive natural shade right up to the water's edge.
history: Historically the quiet, residential side of Havelock, providing a stark contrast to the bustling Radhanagar beach.
famousFor: Shallow swimming waters, Mahua trees, peaceful resorts.
